en: Um well I sort of have some bad news Can I come in
ko: 좀 안 좋은 소식이 있어. 들어가도 돼?

en: Um well um Grandma died today Wow
Didn't she die like five years ago No she just died today
Um okay we're having a memorial service tomorrow Okay I know I went to that already
ko: 5년 전에 안 돌아가셨어? 아니 오늘 돌아가셨어.

en: No you didn't Well then who's been dead for five years Well lots of people
Look are you coming to the memorial service or not Um no
See I already thought she was dead so I've kind of made my peace with it
ko: 아니 안 갔어. 그럼 5년간 누가 죽은 거야? 많은 사람들이.

en: And plus I'm going to a concert tomorrow so I'd invite you but um I only have two tickets left
Mm fine Okay enjoy your concert Thanks enjoy your funeral
ko: 추모식에 올 거야 말 거야? 아니.
